title: sphenopholis × pallens
intro: Sphenopholis × pallens, also known as the pale needlegrass or a hybrid of the sedge plant, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. The medicinal properties of Sphenopholis × pallens have been reported to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help to reduce pain and inflammation in the body. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to support respiratory health, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Sphenopholis × pallens can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
